description_long: This is a classic black and white police car with a boxy, vintage design reminiscent of American law enforcement vehicles from the late 20th century. The car features a white roof and front doors, with the rest of the body painted black, and displays a large, gold police badge insignia on the hood and both front doors. The vehicle is equipped with a side-mounted spotlight on the driver's side and a long radio antenna at the rear, but lacks a visible roof-mounted emergency light bar. The windows are tinted, and the car has chrome bumpers, trim, and hubcaps, adding to its retro appearance. The front grille is wide and rectangular, and the rear features classic tail lights integrated into the body. The overall look is utilitarian yet iconic, suitable for patrolling urban streets or being parked outside a police station.
description: A vintage black and white police car with gold badge insignias, chrome trim, and a side spotlight, lacking a visible roof light bar. The design is classic and utilitarian, evoking mid-to-late 20th-century American law enforcement vehicles.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the large gold badge on the hood, side spotlight, and white roof with black body panels.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the long radio antenna, rear bumper, and gold badge on the door.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the tail lights, rear bumper, and the continuation of the black and white color scheme.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the front grille, gold badge on the hood, and the side spotlight.
attribute_police_markings: No visible text such as 'POLICE', department names, numbers, stripes, or checkers. Only large gold badge insignias are present on the hood and both front doors.
attribute_emergency_lights: None. There is no visible roof-mounted light bar or other emergency lights on the exterior.
attribute_police_insignia: Large gold police badge insignias are visible on the hood and both front doors. The badges are shield-shaped and prominently displayed.
